description_long: This is a stylized wooden mug or small barrel with a cylindrical body composed of vertical wooden staves, reinforced by two prominent black metal bands encircling its upper and lower sections. The wood has a rich, medium-brown tone with visible grain, giving it a rustic and robust appearance. The rim and base are both capped with thick, dark metal, adding to its durability and visual weight. A single, sturdy black metal handle is attached to one side, ergonomically shaped for gripping. The interior appears hollow and dark, suitable for holding liquids or small items. There are no visible labels, markings, or decorative elements beyond the functional metal reinforcements.
description: A rustic wooden mug or small barrel with black metal bands and a sturdy metal handle, featuring a hollow interior and a robust, reinforced design.
description_view_0: The mug is shown at an angle, highlighting the wooden staves, black metal bands, and the curved metal handle on the right.
description_view_1: The handle is centered and fully visible, showing its flat, wide construction and attachment to the mug's body.
description_view_2: The mug is viewed from the opposite side of the handle, displaying the uninterrupted wooden surface and metal bands.
description_view_3: A direct view of the mug's back, with the handle hidden and the wood and metal bands fully visible.
attribute_banding_or_reinforcement: black metal hoops at top and bottom
